hypotheses.description: The parser call `result = json.loads(raw)` at agent_mutante/engine/semiotic_llm_judge.py:113 has no nearby exception handling, so malformed input may escape as an opaque failure.
hypotheses.falsification_test: Feed malformed input to the function containing line 113; a named boundary error or explicit rejection falsifies the hypothesis.

limitations: Hypotheses require module 3 verification; parser candidates may receive isolated induction, while unsupported families remain AST-only.
